Name: Void Grub
Behavior: Flees from player when approached. Only attacks if cornered (player within 60px). Slow moving along asteroid surfaces.
Notes: Docile. Easy intro hunt. Spawns near asteroid clusters.

Name: Skim Ray
Behavior: Fast erratic movement. Circles player. Flees when below 50% HP. No shooting — deals contact damage.
Notes: Fragile but fast. Teaches player to lead shots.

Name: Pack Snarler
Behavior: Spawns in groups of 3. Alpha has 2x HP. Kill alpha → rest flee. Charges in straight line to ram.
Notes: Group hunt mechanic. Kill alpha first.

Name: Membrane Drifter
Behavior: Slow drift. Releases electric pulse every 4s in 150px radius. High HP. Doesn't chase — just drifts and pulses.
Notes: Patience hunt. Stay outside pulse range, kite it down.

Name: Crystal Feeder
Behavior: Grazes near crystal asteroids. Ignores player until attacked. When aggroed: charges repeatedly, drops crystal on each hit received.
Notes: Also drops 5-10 crystal on death. Premium hunt.

Name: Void Leviathan
Behavior: Rare spawn (1 per deep space zone). Slow. Fires slow homing projectiles. Massive hitbox. Boss-tier.
Notes: Rare boss hunt. One kill = full menu supply. Announce spawn with HUD alert.

Name: Grub Meat
Notes: Smells like the inside of an asteroid. Guests assume it's synthetic.

Name: Ray Fillet
Notes: Delicate white meat. First ingredient that doesn't embarrass you.

Name: Snarler Haunch
Notes: Rich, gamey. Regulars start requesting it by name.

Name: Drifter Organ
Notes: Gelatinous. Weird texture. Critics describe it as 'challenging'.
